title: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty
tagline: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty, Kerala

overview.short: Korattymuthy at Koratty Church is the locally known name of Hail Mary or Mother Mary of Syro-Malabar Catholic community at Koratty in Kerala State, India.
overview.description: Korattymuthy at Koratty Church is the locally known name of Hail Mary or Mother Mary of Syro-Malabar Catholic community at Koratty in Kerala State, India. Korattymuthy's Shrine is famous for its annual feast with 'Poovankula' (a special plantain), Muttilizhayal (walking on knee) offerings. Korattymuthy is also known as Our Lady of the Rosary (Poovankula Matha). The shrine is also known as the Lourdes of Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Koratty
topPlaces.description: Koratty is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a main centre of Marian pilgrimage.

topPlaces.name: Infopark, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: InfoPark Thrissur is an information technology park situated in Koratty near Chalakudy of Thrissur District in Kerala. This is the first information technology park in the state that has become operational under the 'Hub and Spoke Model', where InfoPark, Kochi acts as the hub and InfoPark Koratty as the spoke.

topPlaces.name: Muringur Vadakkummuri
topPlaces.description: Muringur Vadakkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Divine Retreat Centre, Muringoor
topPlaces.description: The Divine Retreat Center is a Retreat centre situated in Muringoor, near Chalakudy, Kerala, India near. It is part of the renewal movement of the Vincentian Congregation of India, who have been conducting retreats in parishes in Kerala since the 1950s.

topPlaces.name: Annamanada
topPlaces.description: Annamanada is a village in a southern corner of Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Mambra
topPlaces.description: Mambra is a small but rich village, northern part in the Thrissur district and Southern part in Ernakulam Dt of Kerala, south India.

topPlaces.name: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Annamanada Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple located at Annamanada in Thrissur district, Kerala. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kallur Thekkummuri
topPlaces.description: Kallur Thekkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (14 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, Koratty?
faq.a: The top attractions are Koratty, Infopark, Thrissur, Muringur Vadakkummuri, Divine Retreat Centre, Muringoor, Annamanada.
